parsed_review.raw_review_summary: CP00-061 (RP00.P04.M05.S11, Risk A, 1 unit) adds the UI Operator Surface Permission And Audit Error Copy boundary as a metadata-only assembler that consumes the CP00-060 permission/audit binding result. Contract definition, policy, module, fixture, validators, tests, README, and the RP00 validator are mutually consistent, and the focused suite passes. Plan binding, upstream CP00-060 consumption with fail-closed guards, source micro-phase completion, and every no-write/no-runtime/no-leak boundary hold. Error copy exposes only safe synthetic permission/audit references while hiding raw permission policy and internal audit payloads. No P0-P3 findings. The only outstanding item was generation of the docs/closeout-packs/cp00-061 evidence pack, which is expected and not a defect in the reviewed diff.

boundary_checks.plan_binding: pass - CP00-061 plan binding is enforced across definition, policy, fixture, tests, README, and RP00 validator coverage.
boundary_checks.source_micro_phase_completion: pass - source_micro_phase_completed true, phase_completed false, and next_subphase RP00.P04.M06.S01.
boundary_checks.upstream_cp00_060_binding: pass - assembler consumes and validates the CP00-060 permission/audit result and fails closed on upstream drift.
boundary_checks.error_copy_safety: pass - operator-facing copy exposes only safe synthetic permission and audit references, with blocked fallback for upstream denied states.
boundary_checks.no_raw_permission_policy_or_internal_aud: pass - raw permission policy and internal audit payload exposure are forbidden and validator-enforced.
boundary_checks.no_runtime_permission_engine: pass - runtime permission evaluation, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluator calls, and security trimming are all false.
boundary_checks.no_review_queue_or_assignment_write: pass - review queue, assignment, and notification writes are forbidden and false.
boundary_checks.no_runtime_ui_route_asset_or_storage: pass - runtime UI rendering, route creation, external asset fetching, storage/database/idempotency/lock/product-state writes, and audit writes are all false.

notes: Claude CLI execution succeeded with zero permission denials and exactly one pack-level invocation.
No P0, P1, P2, or P3 findings were reported.
The pre-evidence RP00 validator failure was expected and limited to the missing CP00-061 evidence files.
